name: cidadeprefeito2
description: A pedagogical city-building game focused on sustainability. This MVP allows placing roads and houses, managing a budget, and advancing through months. To run: set up a React + TypeScript project, add these files, install dependencies: react, react-dom, three, @react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei, uuid. Ensure Tailwind CSS is available (e.g., via CDN in index.html). agora vou mudar aqui para a cidade ir se criando sozinha
